# MFMailComposeErrorDomain

**Global Variable**

The domain used for error objects that are associated with the mail composition interface.

## Declaration

```swift
let MFMailComposeErrorDomain: String
```

## Discussion

The error domain associated with [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSError] objects.

## Responding to errors

- **MFMailComposeError**: Mail composition errors.
- **MFMailComposeError.Code**: Error codes for [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSError] objects that are associated with the mail composition interface.
